---
title: "API reference"
toc: false
listing:
  id: reference-modules
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Module"
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 100
---

Per-module API documentation: signatures, named tensor dimensions (shapes +
glossary), and — where the sibling `nitrix-perf-bench` has measured a kernel — a
benchmark headline and table.

::: {.callout-important title="Work in progress"}
These pages are **auto-generated** by `gen_reference_stubs.py` (static, from
source `__all__` + jaxtyping annotations + perf-bench reports). Signatures,
shapes, and benchmark figures are real; the per-parameter and overview **prose is
still being filled**, and coverage is expanding beyond `nitrix.stats`. Not for
final publication as-is (SPEC §6.5).
:::

::: {#reference-modules}
:::
